key: WIVUCMYG
doi: 10.1002/jps.24101
title: Design of Nanosuspensions and Freeze-Dried PLGA Nanoparticles as a Novel Approach for Ophthalmic Delivery of Pranoprofen

[MATERIALS_PROCUREMENT_BLOCK]
Materials: Inline table/result split candidate. Table 3 . p Value Obtained from ANOVA Statistical Analysis of Effect of Independent Variables on the Physicochemical Properties of the NPs Download: Download full-size image Figure 1 .

[EXPERIMENTAL_DESIGN_BLOCK]
Experimental design: varying concentrations or batches. Response surface plot of the effect of the aqueous phase pH on the Z Ave and PI. (cPLGA = 9.0 mg/mL; cPVA = 15.0 mg/mL), (a) Z Ave (nm) = 1962.42–340.55 cPF – 525.31 pH + 70.68 cPF 2 + 39.24 pH 2 + 51.74 cPF pH. (b) PI = 1.19–0.12 cPF – 0.37 pH + 0.10 cPF 2 + 0.04 pH 2 –0.01 cPF pH.
